preFix.title: I Steward Wealth with Purpose and Joy
preFix.subtitle: An affirmation for claiming the identity of someone who holds and directs money for lasting good
preFix.excerpt: A brief affirmation from the Day 76 theme of a 12-week money programme. The statement names stewardship as the active role: holding wealth joyfully with a purpose that extends to family, community, and future generations.
preFix.sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 76 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

content.text: A brief affirmation from the Day 76 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 76 centres on celebrating the identity of wealth steward. The statement names stewardship as an active, joyful role with a purpose that extends beyond the personal.
Say it in the morning, hand on heart. Three times. Notice what it does to the decisions that follow.
I joyfully steward wealth that blesses my family, my community, and future generations.
Adapted from the Day 76 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow.

initialFindings.message: paragraph reads at grade 12.2 (qc threshold: 11) — simplify (target grade 6-8)
initialFindings.snippet: I joyfully steward wealth that blesses my family, my community, and future generations.
